codeStyle: Laravel 12, PHP 8.3, Blade templates, Eloquent ORM. Follow AtoM class table inheritance patterns. BrowseService pattern for all browse pages.
conventions: NEVER execute git commit or git push — always supply commands for user to run via ./bin/release
NEVER modify the AtoM database schema — read/write existing tables only
NEVER execute SQL changes without explicit user approval
NEVER drop a database table — requires explicit double confirmation
NEVER use ENUM columns — use VARCHAR with Dropdown Manager
ALWAYS check /usr/share/nginx/archive first before writing new code
ALWAYS DESCRIBE table_name before coding against it
ALWAYS use ALL fields from AtoM database tables — zero omissions
Migration = copy complete AtoM file and convert Symfony to Laravel/Blade
Controllers must only call service methods — never direct DB queries
Services handle both base table and i18n table in single transaction
No hardcoded values — use Dropdown Manager/Taxonomy/DB
No placeholder comments, no TODO, no dummy data
Every page must be identical to AtoM — 100% clone, like for like
Packages in packages/ are like AtoM plugins
This is Heratio — never reference AtoM in code/UI, only in migration docs
